scope: correct the former yellow-body C94 misidentification and preserve the separate factory C94 position as an electrical boundary

factory_source.observation: the assembly drawing separately labels the small VT2 body with grade б and the adjacent two-terminal rectangle C94

vt2_component_registration.observation: the yellow rectangular body has three visible leads, the КТ315 grade letter Б, and 8901 date code; pin 1 shares R65.1's composite-output landing

independent_component_observations.observation: overlapping July view independently shows the same yellow three-lead body and outer lap joints
independent May angle resolves the same Б/8901 body and three leads

component_to_board_affine.observation: coefficients are the inverse of the exact D102-local board-to-photo affine and reproduce the recorded body/pin coordinates

surface_lap_corroboration.observation: all three projections land on backside copper without a matching annulus, drill, or solder joint, corroborating the factory raised-lead component-side lap construction

c94_disposition.placement_method: three-point local factory-drawing affine through registered R65/R67/R66, translated by the residual between its VT2 projection and the stronger owner-photo VT2 body fit
c94_disposition.retraction: the former 680 pF value and C94.2/R65.1 VIDEO_OUT join came from treating the three-lead Б/8901 КТ315 body as a two-lead capacitor; those promotions are invalid
